title: Behavior Learning with Reinforcement Learning from Expert Demonstrations
description: Proposed, developed, and tested deep reinforcement learning algorithms combining expert demonstrations for controlling redundant robot manipulators, with research focused on biased exploration algorithms to guide the RL process through explicit exploration demonstrations.

title: Human Behavior Learning with Imitation Learning
description: Implemented and analyzed feed-forward neural networks for imitating human behavior in robot manipulator control, contributing to advancements in joint space learning and neural network applications in robotics.
